name: KLM Royal Dutch Airlines

carryOn.notes: Economy: 1 bag + 1 accessory (total 12 kg). Business: 2 bags + 1 accessory (total 18 kg).

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does KLM include free checked bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, KLM includes checked baggage on most intercontinental routes. European Light fares may not include checked bags.
